---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that Boxcar doesn't support today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. (A new scenario? a provider backend? an OS-guide recipe?
a11y improvement? VM tooling?)

## Alternatives considered

Anything you've tried or other approaches you weighed.

## Additional context

Links, references, or screenshots.
